title: Can occasional smoking raise your health insurance premium? Here's what experts say
summary: &nbsp;Someone who smokes just a handful of times a year may still reportedly be classified as a smoker and could face premiums that are 30% to 50% higher than those charged to non-smokers.&nbsp;

title: Flexi-Cap vs Focused Funds: Diversification comfort vs conviction risk - what actually wins over cycles?
summary: Two actively managed equity fund categories, each built on a distinct logic of portfolio construction - one defined by breadth, the other by deliberate concentration.

title: When reinvestment fails: A look at the tax implications of unused Capital Gains Account Scheme funds
summary: Section 54F is a tax-saving provision designed to encourage residential housing investments by exempting LTCG on non-residential assets, capped at a maximum investment threshold of ₹10 crore.

title: Unclaimed Financial Assets: How to check and claim your forgotten money from banks, mutual funds, insurance and NPS
summary: India has ₹78,000 crore in unclaimed bank deposits, ₹14,000 crore in unclaimed insurance funds, and ₹3,000 crore in unclaimed mutual fund investments. So, let's find out the different types of unclaimed assets and how you can check whether any belong to you, and the steps to claim them.

title: Step-by-step guide to file ITR online: Know the complete process from registration to verification
summary: Filing an ITR involves following a series of steps to ensure all details are reported accurately. The Income Tax Department provides a pre-filled ITR-1 filing service on the e-Filing portal for registered users. This guide covers the step-by-step process of filing the ITR-1 form.

title: P/E vs PEG ratio: Which metric offers deeper insight into a company's growth potential and valuation?
summary: The price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio is one of the most common metrics for valuing a stock. By incorporating earnings growth, the PEG ratio provides a more comprehensive view of whether a stock is fairly valued relative to its earnings growth.

title: FOMO is reshaping investing behaviour. Are India’s financial advisers keeping up?
summary: As traditional wealth management models begin to fray, the industry must pivot toward real-time engagement and behavioural coaching to stay relevant.

title: Income-tax returns: What ITR deductions are available for medical treatments and healthcare expenses? Check details here
summary: ITR deductions reduce your taxable income by subtracting certain expenses from gross income. Today we take a look at the various medical and healthcare related deductions available under the old tax regime…

title: India’s wealth boom has a problem: 84.8% of households do not have a will, study finds
summary: 1 Finance Magazine has found that 84.8% of Indians have no will, and 62.5% have no plans to make one, highlighting weak estate planning, limited financial awareness, and rising inheritance disputes amid growing intergenerational wealth transfers.&nbsp;

title: Employees Provident Fund: Who is eligible and non-eligible to be nominee?
summary: The EPFO manages employees' provident fund and pension schemes in India. Members must add nominess for both with rules differing based on marital status. E-nomination process available for Aadhaar-verified UAN holders.

title: Gas engine maker Innio valued at $23 billion as shares jump in Nasdaq debut
summary: Innio, the innovative gas engine manufacturer, made a spectacular entrance on the Nasdaq, with its market valuation soaring past $23 billion. The company’s shares opened significantly above their initial offer price, capturing the attention of investors eager to back businesses bolstering AI infrast

title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Friday
summary: Indian equities ended largely unchanged as West Asia tensions tempered risk appetite. Broader markets outperformed despite recent corrections, while investors awaited the RBI policy decision and GDP data. Analysts flagged 23,500 as a key resistance and 23,300–23,200 as important support levels.

title: Goldman Sachs expects SpaceX's AI revenue to surge 100-fold by 2030, FT reports
summary: Goldman's ⁠forecasts show ‌that the bank ​expects ​revenue at SpaceX's AI segment ⁠to soar 388% from a year ​earlier to $15.6 billion in 2026, ​and reach $34.5 billion in 2027, according to the report, citing a person familiar with the matter.

title: Ola Electric raises Rs 780 crore via QIP, issue oversubscribed 56%
summary: The strong response came despite volatile equity markets and signals continued institutional confidence in Ola Electric's growth strategy, technology roadmap and positioning within India's electric vehicle sector.

title: Satin Creditcare promoters to infuse Rs 100 crore, raise stake
summary: Satin Creditcare Network's promoters will invest Rs 100 crore through convertible warrants, increasing their stake to 38.32% from 36.17%. The capital infusion will strengthen the lender's balance sheet, support growth plans and aid its target of achieving Rs 32,000 crore AUM by 2030.

title: Blackstone private credit fund caps withdrawals as redemption requests surge
summary: After investors sought to pull out 10% of shares in the second-quarter tender offer, compared to 7.9% in the previous quarter, the $79 billion Blackstone Private Credit Fund limited withdrawals to 5%, the customary limit for these vehicles.

title: US Supreme Court upholds SEC in fight over 'disgorgement' power
summary: The justices, in a 9-0 ruling, upheld a lower court's decision that had endorsed a wide use of the SEC's disgorgement authority. ‌President Donald Trump's ⁠administration had ⁠defended the SEC in the case.

title: US stocks: Pinterest deepens Amazon partnership with $4 billion cloud deal
summary: Amazon.com's cloud ​computing unit will provide Pinterest its custom chip processors, including Graviton ​and Trainium, to help scale its AI initiatives.

title: US Stocks: Broadcom set to shed $300 billion in value as AI results fail to impress; shares fall 14%
summary: The losses, if sustained, will erase more than $315 billion from the company's market value of about $2.268 trillion, in one of the biggest one-day wipeouts ever.

title: US stocks today: Nasdaq nosedives as Broadcom revenue miss dents chip stocks
summary: The ​S&P ​500 and the ​Nasdaq dropped at the open on Thursday, as ‌Broadcom's ⁠revenue ⁠miss pressured ​chip stocks, while equity investors took ​a breather after a strong rally ​to ⁠record highs.
